ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the school */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent or guardian */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Student's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Student's email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent or guardian */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the parent or guardian */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent or guardian */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent or guardian */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher assigned to the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the class */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained by the student */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of the exam (e.g. midterm, final, quiz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teacher belongs to */,
  "subject_specialty" TEXT /* Subject the teacher specializes in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g. present, absent, late) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "exam_time" TEXT /* Time of the exam */,
  "exam_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication entry */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_message" TEXT /* Message or content of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "predicted_score" REAL /* Predicted score of the student */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0.0-1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "intervention_plan" TEXT /* Intervention plan and strategies */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions for the student and teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
